# Parent Guidebook · 养育有方 (parentguidebook.org)

> Free, evidence-based, bilingual (English and Chinese) guide to raising a whole, healthy, resilient child. Covers body, mind, daily life, and heart & soul. Not medical advice.

Educational content from published research and international guidelines. Currently live: Eyes (vision screening, strabismus, amblyopia, myopia, eye exams). More domains coming: breathing, teeth, nutrition, attention, learning, outdoor life, and more. For parents and caregivers worldwide.

## Main pages

- [Home (English)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/): Landing and domain index
- [Home (Chinese)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/): 首页与领域索引
- [About (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/about/): How we create content
- [About (ZH)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/about/): 关于我们
- [Sources (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/sources/): Full source list
- [Sources (ZH)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/sources/): 参考来源

## Eyes — Emergency signs (when to act quickly)

- [White pupil / leukocoria (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/white-pupil/)
- [White pupil / 白瞳 (ZH)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/white-pupil/)
- [Misaligned eyes / strabismus (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/misaligned-eyes/)
- [Misaligned eyes / 斜视 (ZH)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/misaligned-eyes/)
- [Signs of vision problems (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/signs-of-vision-problems/)
- [Signs of vision problems (ZH)](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/signs-of-vision-problems/)

## Eyes — Guides by age

- [Newborn eyes, first year (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/newborn-eyes/) · [ZH](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/newborn-eyes/)
- [Toddler & preschool (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/toddler-preschool/) · [ZH](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/toddler-preschool/)
- [School-age eye health (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/school-age/) · [ZH](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/school-age/)

## Eyes — Eye exams

- [When to get screened / schedule (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/schedule/) · [ZH](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/schedule/)
- [What happens at an eye exam (EN)](https://parentguidebook.org/en/body/eyes/what-happens/) · [ZH](https://parentguidebook.org/zh/body/eyes/what-happens/)
